results.definition_en: What people and animals take in to live.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 食物；人或動物賴以維生的可食之物。
results.example_en: There is food on the table for you.

results.definition_en: Power used to make something move or happen.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 力、力量；推動或迫使事物的能量。
results.example_en: He pushed the door open with great force.

results.definition_en: The shape or way a thing looks.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 形狀、形式；事物呈現的樣貌。
results.example_en: The cloud took the form of a bird.

results.definition_en: A person one knows and likes.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 朋友；認識且喜歡的人。
results.example_en: She is my best friend.

results.definition_en: The part one sees first; opposite to the back.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 正面、前方；與後方相對。
results.example_en: She sat in the front of the car.

results.definition_en: The sweet part of a plant that has seeds, like apples or oranges.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 水果；植物含種子的甜味部分。
results.example_en: I eat fruit every day.

results.definition_en: A hard, see-through stuff used for windows or cups.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 玻璃；堅硬透明的材質，常用於窗戶或杯子。
results.example_en: Be careful, the glass may break.

results.definition_en: A bright yellow metal of great value.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 黃金；明亮黃色、極具價值的金屬。
results.example_en: Her ring is made of gold.

results.definition_en: The group of people who rule a country.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 政府；治理國家的機構或團體。
results.example_en: The government will make a new law.

results.definition_en: A small hard seed used for food, like rice or wheat.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 穀物、穀粒；可食的細小硬種子，如稻米或小麥。
results.example_en: The farmer sells grain to the town.

results.definition_en: The green plant that covers the ground in fields.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 草；田野裡綠色、覆蓋地面的植物。
results.example_en: The cow ate the grass.

results.definition_en: A firm hold of a thing with the hand.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 緊握、抓握；用手堅固地握住。
results.example_en: He has a strong grip on the rope.

results.definition_en: Two or more things or people put together.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 群、團體；兩個以上聚在一起的人或物。
results.example_en: A group of children went into the park.

results.definition_en: The act of getting bigger over time.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 生長、成長；隨時間變大或變多。
results.example_en: The growth of the tree was slow.

results.definition_en: A person or book that shows the way to others.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 指南、導覽；指引方向的人或書。
results.example_en: We had a guide for our walk in the wood.
results.example_zh_tw: 我們在森林裡散步時有導覽。

results.definition_en: A safe place by the sea where ships can stay.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 港口、海港；船舶安全停泊的水域。
results.example_en: The boat came into the harbour at night.

results.definition_en: A state where things go well together.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 和諧、融洽；事物相處良好的狀態。
results.example_en: They live in harmony with their friends.

results.definition_en: A strong bad feeling about a person or thing.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 憎恨、討厭；對人事物的強烈反感。
results.example_en: She has a deep hate for lies.

results.definition_en: The sense by which sounds come to one through the ears.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 聽覺；耳朵感知聲音的能力。
results.example_en: His hearing is not as good as before.

results.definition_en: The state of being hot, or the thing one feels from a fire.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 熱、熱度；高溫狀態或火所散發的暖意。
results.example_en: The heat from the sun is strong today.

results.definition_en: An act done to make a thing easier for another.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 幫忙、協助；使他人事情變得輕鬆。
results.example_en: Thank you for your help yesterday.

results.definition_en: All that has happened in the past, or the story of it.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 歷史；過去發生的事或其敘述。
results.example_en: We learn history at school.

results.definition_en: An opening in a thing, often round.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 洞、孔；事物上的開口，常為圓形。
results.example_en: There is a hole in my sock.

results.definition_en: The feeling that a good thing will happen.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 希望；相信好事將至的感覺。
results.example_en: I have hope that she will get well.

results.definition_en: A part of the day, made of sixty minutes.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 小時；六十分鐘的時長。
results.example_en: Wait for me one hour.
